ClientId.description: Stable client identifier inside one managed realm.
ClientId.name: clientId

FilterEnabled.description: Filter IAM collections by enabled status.
FilterEnabled.name: filter[enabled]

FilterProtocol.description: Filter client or scope collections by protocol.
FilterProtocol.name: filter[protocol]

IamUserId.description: Stable Keycloak user identifier inside one managed realm.
IamUserId.name: iamUserId

IdempotencyKey.description: Stable idempotency token for safe retries of POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE operations routed through the gateway. Replays are retained for 24h and surfaced through X-Idempotency-Replayed.
IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key

PageAfter.description: Opaque cursor for the next page window.
PageAfter.name: page[after]

PageSize.description: Maximum number of items to return for list and catalog routes.
PageSize.name: page[size]

RealmId.description: Stable tenant realm identifier managed through the BaaS IAM surface.
RealmId.name: realmId

RoleName.description: Stable realm-role name inside one managed realm.
RoleName.name: roleName

ScopeName.description: Stable client-scope identifier inside one managed realm.
ScopeName.name: scopeName

Search.description: Free-text search across human-facing route metadata.
Search.name: search

XApiVersion.description: Pinned additive contract version for the v1 public API release published with gateway QoS and hardening support.
XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version

XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, audit flows, and backfilled by the gateway when recovery requires it.
XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id

EntityMetadata.description: Non-secret additive metadata for canonical entities.

IamAttributes.description: Multi-valued IAM attributes normalized from Keycloak user, role, scope, realm, and client metadata.

info.description: Tenant-scoped IAM administration for Keycloak realms, clients, roles, scopes, and users through normalized BaaS contracts. Generated from the unified public API contract for v1.
info.summary: Tenant-scoped IAM administration for Keycloak realms, clients, roles, scopes, and users through normalized BaaS contracts.
info.title: In Atelier IAM API
